tasks.subject: Task 8: Add _load_comfy_fixture helper + refactor 34 tests onto captured fixtures
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace every hand-typed ComfyUI HTTP-response literal in tests/engines/test_comfyui.py with a load from tests/engines/fixtures/comfyui/{prompt_submit,history_done}.json via a new _load_comfy_fixture helper in tests/engines/conftest.py.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/engines/conftest.py
- Modify: tests/engines/test_comfyui.py (34 tests refactored)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- conftest.py defines _load_comfy_fixture(name) -> dict[str, Any]
- no hand-typed {"prompt_id": "..."} in test bodies
- 34 tests still passing
- pre-commit green

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/conftest.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["conftest.py defines _load_comfy_fixture(name) -> dict[str, Any]", "no hand-typed {\"prompt_id\": \"...\"} in test bodies", "34 tests still passing", "pre-commit green"], "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-03-layer-p-closeout.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: ComfyUI shape-lockdown tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append two new shape-lockdown tests to tests/engines/test_comfyui.py that pin the captured ComfyUI HTTP response contract.

tasks.subject: Task 10: README + PROGRESS Phase 28 + layer-p-closed tag
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document Layer P close-out (README user-facing sub-section + PROGRESS Phase 28 entry), reset Single Next Action, create annotated layer-p-closed git tag at the closure commit.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: PROGRESS.md
- (Tag): annotated layer-p-closed at the T10 commit

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README sub-section exists with env vars + quickstart + KEEP_POD + cost shape
- PROGRESS Phase 28 entry with per-task SHAs + bug-catch list + design decisions
- Single Next Action reset
- Layer-O carry-forward #1 left intact (already closed by Layer N)
- layer-p-closed annotated tag at T10 commit
- full offline gate green
- 1036 passed, 3 skipped

**Verify:** `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run test && pixi run typecheck && pixi run lint && rg 'Engine integration \(ComfyUI \+ Wan i2v\)' README.md && rg '^### Phase 28 — Layer P close-out' PROGRESS.md && git tag -l 'layer-p-closed' -n1`
